updates.title: Dark patterns that you need to watch out for while buying insurance
updates.summary: From pre-ticked add-ons to hidden renewal tweaks, insurance buyers face digital nudges that inflate premiums. Irdai calls for insurers to clean up dark patterns.

updates.title: IRDAI forms sub-committee to strengthen health insurance ecosystem in India
updates.summary: IRDAI forms a sub-committee to strengthen the health insurance ecosystem, focusing on coverage, claims, and consumer experience to boost access, efficiency, and trust.

updates.title: EPFO 3.0: From PF withdrawal categories and pension to UPI-based fund access, here are 10 key things to know
updates.summary: EPFO 3.0 aims to introduce simplified withdrawal rules, faster UPI-based fund access, and reduced documentation, enhancing provident fund efficiency, flexibility, and retirement security of members.

updates.title: Is your KYC safe? 5 steps to check status and avoid mutual fund scams
updates.summary: Mutual fund KYC verification helps investors stay scam-free by ensuring updated records, understanding status categories, and following simple steps to maintain secure, compliant investments across the country.

updates.title: PPFAS Asset Management gets PFRDA approval to launch pension fund under NPS
updates.summary: The will now manage retirement savings via a dedicated pension fund, leveraging NPS tax benefits and long-term growth potential.

updates.title: RBI holds repo rate at 5.25%: What it means for home loan borrowers and EMIs
updates.summary: RBI holds the repo rate at 5.25%, providing stability for home loan borrowers. This will ensure predictable EMIs, clarity and potential interest savings amid global economic uncertainties.

updates.title: RBI shuns hawkish signal, keeps rates unchanged amid war shock
updates.summary: MPC holds repo rate at 5.25% and retains the neutral stance. RBI pegs FY26 growth higher at 7.6%, but with downside risks; says inflation is contained.

updates.title: RBI policy: Why the end of the ‘Goldilocks’ phase isn’t a jolt for investors
updates.summary: With growth holding steady and inflation remaining manageable, the central bank’s latest roadmap offers a reassuring path through global geopolitical volatility.

updates.title: India's growth may slow to 6.6% in FY27 due to West Asia war: World Bank
updates.summary: The multilateral agency’s estimate is slightly lower than the 6.9% pace projected by the Reserve Bank of (RBI) in its Wednesday's monetary policy statement and the government’s estimate of 6.8-7.2% made in January before the US and Israel began pummelling Iran on 28 February.

updates.title: RBI agrees to 'demand from some quarters,' unveils first-ever core inflation projection at 4.4% for FY27
updates.summary: RBI has started giving core inflation projections for the first time, a move driven by demand from experts. This new transparency offers a deeper look into underlying price pressures, excluding volatile food and fuel costs.

updates.title: RBI holds key policy rate at 5.25%
updates.summary: A Mint poll of 10 economists and market participants had pointed to rising inflation risks and a weakening growth outlook, with all expecting the MPC to hold rates while signalling a more cautious policy stance.
